Vladimir Mayakovsky 1914.jpg.publicationScope: identity, depicted person, Kazan location, 1914 date and unknown photographer
Vladimir Mayakovsky 1914.jpg.caption: Футурист Владимир Маяковский. Казань, 1914.
Vladimir Mayakovsky 1914.jpg.creator: Unknown author
Vladimir Mayakovsky 1914.jpg.independentEvidenceInstitution: ГБУК г. Москвы «Государственный музей В. В. Маяковского»

visualMatch.notes: The museum/photo-chronicle witness and C03 show the same studio negative: identical pose, top hat, cigarette and holder, cane, glove, clothing, background and handwritten inscription. C03 is a reduced high-contrast reproduction of that witness.

publicDomainRationale.note: This records the Commons source page's public-domain rationale; it is separate from the museum-based caption verification.

Vladimir Mayakovsky 1914.jpg.editorialNotes: Do not name a photographer. Prefer the museum-backed Kazan/1914 caption over the weaker source link currently stored on the Commons file page.

Mayakovsky 1928 by Osip Brik.jpg.publicationScope: identity, depicted person, 1928 date and Osip Brik photographer attribution
Mayakovsky 1928 by Osip Brik.jpg.caption: Владимир Маяковский. Фотография Осипа Брика, 1928.
Mayakovsky 1928 by Osip Brik.jpg.creator: Осип Максимович Брик

independentEvidence.indexWitness: The official ten-volume index states under portraits: portrait 2 is a 1928 photograph by O. M. Brik in volume seven.
independentEvidence.reproductionWitness: The official scan of volume seven, viewer page 5, contains the exact portrait reproduced by C08.

visualMatch.notes: C08 is a close crop of the RSL volume-seven reproduction: identical face, raised left hand, striped shirt and tie, jacket pattern, lighting and framing.

publicDomainRationale.note: This records the Commons source page's public-domain rationale and is separate from the RSL author/date verification.

Mayakovsky 1928 by Osip Brik.jpg.editorialNotes: The RSL witnesses establish photographer and date but not the shooting location. Do not add a location without a separate object card or contemporary record.
